Class JdbcCountQueryCreator

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.repository.query.parser.AbstractQueryCreator<ParametrizedQuery, Criteria>
org.springframework.data.relational.repository.query.RelationalQueryCreator<ParametrizedQuery>
org.springframework.data.jdbc.repository.query.JdbcQueryCreator
org.springframework.data.jdbc.repository.query.JdbcCountQueryCreator
public class JdbcCountQueryCreator extends JdbcQueryCreator
JdbcQueryCreator that creates COUNT(*) queries without applying limit/offset and Sort.
Since:
2.2
Author:
Mark Paluch, Diego Krupitza
